zh.Crookston, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾可盧可斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith於1280年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親PETER MURDOCK66歲，母親ISABELLA Durward of Montieth65歲。她於大約1295年與Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年80歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.Crookston, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾可盧可斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith于1280年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲PETER MURDOCK66岁，母亲ISABELLA Durward of Montieth65岁。她于大约1295年与Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在苏格兰培爾培斯享年80岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Murdock,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of Scottish   Murdoch  .

variants.name: Murdoch
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal names Muireadhach ‘mariner’, Murchadh ‘sea-warrior’, and Muircheartach ‘sea-ruler’, the first element in each being muir ‘sea’. The personal name was introduced into Yorkshire and Normandy by Norsemen from Ireland as early as the 10th century. The surname in post-Conquest medieval England usually belongs to Norman families.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith was born in 1280, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, PETER MURDOCK, was 66 and her mother, ISABELLA Durward of Montieth, was 65. She married Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith about 1295, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1360, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 80, and was buried in Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith est née en 1280, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, PETER MURDOCK, avait 66 ans et sa mère, ISABELLA Durward of Montieth, avait 65 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith environ 1295, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith 1280 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater PETER MURDOCK 66 und ihre Mutter ISABELLA Durward of Montieth 65. Sie hat um 1295 in Scotland Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

ht.Prisoner of English - Monmouthshire, Wal: Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith è nata il nel 1280 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, PETER MURDOCK, aveva 66 anni e sua madre, ISABELLA Durward of Montieth, aveva 65 anni. Lei sposato Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith circa 1295, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.Menteith, Perth, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteithが1280年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父PETER MURDOCKは66歳，母ISABELLA Durward of Montiethは65歳であった。約1295年にスコットランドでAlan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで80歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith(이)가 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 PETER MURDOCK(은)는 66세였고, 그녀의 어머니 ISABELLA Durward of Montieth(은)는 65세였다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 스컷랜드에서 Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith nasceu em 1280, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, PETER MURDOCK, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, ISABELLA Durward of Montieth, tinha 65 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith aproximadamente 1295, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith родилась в 1280 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени PETER MURDOCK было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали ISABELLA Durward of Montieth, 65. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith около 1295 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith nació en 1280, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, PETER MURDOCK, tenía 66 años y su mamá, ISABELLA Durward of Montieth, tenía 65 años. Se casó con Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith aproximadamente 1295, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1360, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Perthshire, Scotland.
